title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at CCAvenue

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at CCAvenue
jsonLd.description:
We at CCAvenue are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CCAvenue:
CCAvenue is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
